thought: All targeted clicks in the ringtone picker have failed or caused loops. The only reliable way to exit a modal picker is the system Back button. Pressing back should return us to the alarm screen where we can verify the ringtone and disable vibration. This avoids UI-specific selectors and respects Android navigation patterns.
